name: Windmill
preceding_figure_names: Change of Places Left to Right,Rolling Off the Arm,Spanish Arms,Windmill
following_figure_names: Toe Heel Swivels,Stop and Go,Hip Bump,Change of Places Left to Right,Windmill,Rolling Off the Arm,Link
notes: Turn commences at end of previous beat. Extend L arm downwards and to L and R arm upwards and to R. Incline body slightly L. On step 5, rotate L hand slightly R from wrist. Steps 3-5: arms are extended from the elbows, keeping elbows near to body. Return arms and body to starting position. Incline body slightly R on steps 3-5. Return body to normal position on step 6.

steps.action: Turn left on right foot and perform forward chasse LRL ending in Closed Position
comments: Extend L arm downwards and to L and R arm upwards and to R.
Steps 3-5: arms are extended from the elbows, keeping elbows near to body.

steps.action: Three small runs forward, passing in front of partner, then turn
Backward chasse LRL ending in Open Position
